'''Jhompfi''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Brolf]] working under [[Filvian (Brolf)|Patriot]] (Filvian) to assassinate [[Passel Argente/Legends|Passel Argente]].

==Biography==
In [[27 BBY/Legends|27 BBY]], Jhompfi lived in the [[Covered Brush]] housing ring and smuggled [[rissle stick]]s to [[Barlok/Legends|Barlok's]] [[Karf]] population. He was among the younger Brolfi led by [[Filvian (Brolf)|Filvian]] (codenamed 'Patriot,' working under [[Kinman Doriana/Legends|Kinman Doriana]], 'Defender') who organized themselves to gather materials needed to construct a homemade [[Missile/Legends|missile]] to use against the [[Passel Argente/Legends|leader]] of the [[Corporate Alliance/Legends|Corporate Alliance]] and the [[Guild Master/Legends|guildmaster]] of Barlok's [[mining]] operations as they met for negotiations.<ref name="Outbound Flight" />

Jhompfi, who covertly accepted a pair of [[burst thrusters]] from [[Duefgrin]], passed the thrusters on to fellow conspirator [[Migress]]. Other items the Brolfi collected for the missile construct were [[Explosive charge/Legends|explosives]], a stabilization system, and alloy packing cylinders.<ref name="Outbound Flight" />
